benchmarkSets.name: Singapore business-dossier diligence edge cases
limitations: Name similarity can over-match common company names when no UEN is supplied.
Expired licence fixtures can be stale if upstream date formats change.
Sector hints can select modules that are irrelevant to a diversified entity.
Public-only datasets may omit licensed, paid, private, or authentication-gated records.
Fresh upstream outages can look like no coverage unless source-unavailable gaps are preserved.
A correct UEN with outdated public records can still miss recent status changes.

workflows.evidence: verify + representative CDD orchestrator smoke checks

notes: Primary company/UEN CDD workflow baseline remained inside all target bands.
Architecture-sector enrichment preserved provenance, gaps, limits, and freshness metadata.
Healthcare-sector enrichment preserved evidence-bound gaps and limits.
Hospitality-sector enrichment preserved source attribution and review limits.

limits: This page is generated from local or CI benchmark evidence; it is not an SLA.
Skipped smoke checks are reported separately and do not count as failures.
Freshness completeness measures whether outputs expose freshness metadata, not whether upstream data is intrinsically complete.
